description: Immerse yourself in the breathtaking landscapes and rich culture of Switzerland, where the charm of the Alps meets the vibrant cities. This 5-day journey is designed for couples who are fans of 'Crash Landing on You', allowing you to explore iconic filming locations while indulging in the local culture and history. From the picturesque streets of Zurich to the serene beauty of Lucerne, each day is filled with memorable experiences and delightful surprises.

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Café Sprüngli, famous for its luxurious pastries and rich hot chocolate. Enjoy the cozy atmosphere as you savor a traditional Swiss breakfast.

Stroll through the charming streets of Zurich Old Town, where medieval buildings and vibrant shops create a picturesque setting. Don't miss the iconic Grossmünster church and the beautiful views from Lindenhof hill.

Enjoy a hearty Swiss lunch at Zeughauskeller, a historic restaurant known for its traditional dishes like Zürcher Geschnetzeltes (sliced veal) and delicious sausages. The rustic ambiance adds to the experience.
Take a leisurely walk along Lake Zurich, where you can enjoy the serene views and perhaps even rent a paddleboat. The lakeside promenade is perfect for a romantic stroll.

activities.activity: Shopping for Crash Landing on You merchandise
activities.description: Head to the local shops in Zurich to find exclusive Crash Landing on You merchandise. Look for themed souvenirs and fan goods that will remind you of your favorite moments from the show.
Indulge in a traditional Swiss dinner at Restaurant Swiss Chuchi, where you can try authentic fondue and raclette. The warm atmosphere and delicious food make it a perfect end to your day.

activities.activity: Evening walk along the Limmat River
activities.description: End your day with a peaceful evening walk along the Limmat River. The illuminated buildings and calm waters create a romantic setting, perfect for couples.

days.title: Exploring Zurich and Day Trip to Lucerne

transit.memo: Enjoy a scenic train ride from Zurich to Lucerne.

activities.description: Start your day in Lucerne by visiting the iconic Chapel Bridge, a beautiful wooden bridge adorned with paintings that depict the city's history. It's a perfect spot for a romantic stroll and some lovely photos.
Take a relaxing boat tour on Lake Lucerne, surrounded by stunning mountain scenery. This is a great way to soak in the natural beauty of the area and enjoy some peaceful moments together.
Enjoy a traditional Swiss lunch at Restaurant Fritschi, known for its cozy atmosphere and delicious local dishes. Try the Swiss cheese fondue for an authentic experience!

Explore the Richard Wagner Museum, located in the villa where the composer lived. The museum offers insights into his life and works, set against the backdrop of beautiful gardens and views of the lake.

activities.activity: Shopping for Crash Landing on You Merchandise
activities.description: Head to the local shops in Lucerne to find exclusive Crash Landing on You merchandise. Look for souvenirs that will remind you of your favorite moments from the show!
End your day with dinner at Wirtshaus Galliker, a charming restaurant known for its hearty Swiss cuisine. Enjoy a cozy atmosphere and try their famous rösti, a Swiss potato dish.
Take the train back to Zurich after a fulfilling day in Lucerne. Relax and reflect on the beautiful sights and experiences you've had.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride through the Swiss countryside.

activities.description: Stroll around the charming town of Interlaken, nestled between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz. Take in the stunning views of the surrounding mountains and enjoy the fresh alpine air.
Savor a delicious Swiss lunch at Restaurant Taverne, known for its cozy atmosphere and traditional dishes like Rösti and fondue. Perfect for refueling before your next adventure!
Hop on the train to Grindelwald, a picturesque village that serves as a gateway to the Jungfrau region. The journey offers breathtaking views of the Eiger mountain.

Once in Grindelwald, take a leisurely walk through the village and enjoy the stunning scenery. Don't forget to check out the local shops for unique souvenirs and fan goods related to 'Crash Landing on You'.

activities.activity: Visit the Grindelwald First Cliff Walk
activities.description: Experience the thrill of the First Cliff Walk by Tissot, a suspension bridge offering panoramic views of the Alps. It's a perfect spot for memorable photos!
Enjoy a romantic dinner at Restaurant Belvedere, where you can indulge in Swiss cuisine while overlooking the stunning mountain landscape. A perfect end to your day!
Take the train back to Interlaken for a restful night. Reflect on the day's adventures and prepare for more exploration tomorrow!

days.title: Visit to Bern and Return to Zurich

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic train ride through the Swiss countryside.

activities.description: Stroll through the UNESCO World Heritage-listed Old Town of Bern, where you can admire the medieval architecture and charming streets. Don't miss the famous Zytglogge clock tower, which puts on a delightful show every hour.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at Restaurant Rosengarten, which offers stunning views of the city and a menu featuring local Swiss cuisine. Try the rösti, a Swiss potato dish that is a must-try!
Visit the iconic Zytglogge clock tower, where you can learn about its history and watch the animated figurines come to life at the hour. It's a great spot for photos!

activities.activity: Shopping for Crash Landing on You Merchandise
activities.description: Head to a local shop that specializes in K-drama merchandise, including items from Crash Landing on You. It's the perfect place to find souvenirs and gifts for fans!
Catch a train back to Zurich, where you can relax and reflect on your day in Bern. The train ride offers beautiful views of the Swiss landscape.
Enjoy a cozy dinner at Swiss Chuchi, known for its traditional Swiss fondue. It's a great way to end your day with a warm and hearty meal.
Take a leisurely evening stroll along Lake Zurich. The serene atmosphere and beautiful views of the city lights reflecting on the water make for a romantic end to your day.

transit.memo: Direct flight back to Washington D.C.

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Café Sprüngli, famous for its luxurious pastries and hot chocolate. Enjoy a cozy atmosphere as you savor their signature Luxemburgerli macarons alongside a fresh coffee.

Explore the rich cultural history of Switzerland at the Swiss National Museum. The museum showcases a vast collection of artifacts, including items related to the history of the beloved series 'Crash Landing on You'.

Enjoy a hearty Swiss lunch at Zeughauskeller, a historic restaurant known for its traditional Swiss dishes like Zürcher Geschnetzeltes. The ambiance is lively, making it a perfect spot to relax before your flight.

activities.activity: Shopping for Crash Landing on You Merchandise
activities.description: Before heading to the airport, take some time to shop for 'Crash Landing on You' merchandise at local stores. Look for unique souvenirs that celebrate your favorite moments from the series.
